title: Should You Wait to Buy Packaging Corporation of America?
text: Packaging Corporation of America NYSE: PKG issued a mixed Q2 report, but details within it catalyzed a substantial increase in share price. The details include a better-than-expected margin and an outlook for demand improvement that could sustain through the end of the year.

title: Packaging Corp (PKG) Q2 Earnings Lag Estimates on Low Volumes
text: Packaging Corp's (PKG) Q2 bottom-line results reflect lower volume in both of its segments.

title: Packaging Corporation of America shares rise as 2Q results beat expectations despite decline in profit and sales
text: Packaging Corporation of America, the third largest producer of containerboard products in North America, shares rose by more than 10% after its second quarter results topped expectations, despite both its profit and revenue falling year-over-year. For 2Q, it posted earnings per share of $2.31, down from $3.23 in the year-ago quarter but above the Street's expectation of $1.96, per Zacks Consensus Estimate.

title: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: The headline numbers for Packaging Corp. (PKG) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended June 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Q2 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Packaging Corp. (PKG) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.31 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.95 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.23 per share a year ago.

title: Packaging Corporation of America Reports Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: LAKE FOREST, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Packaging Corporation of America (NYSE: PKG) today reported second quarter 2023 net income of $203 million, or $2.24 per share, and net income of $209 million, or $2.31 per share, excluding special items. Second quarter net sales were $2.0 billion in 2023 and $2.2 billion in 2022. Diluted earnings per share attributable to Packaging Corporation of America shareholders         Three Months Ended     June 30     2023   2022   Change   Reported Diluted EPS $ 2.2.

title: What's in Store for Packaging Corp.'s (PKG) Q2 Earnings?
text: Packaging Corp's (PKG) second-quarter 2023 results are likely to reflect the impacts of weak demand.

title: Earnings Preview: Packaging Corp. (PKG) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
